prompt: A haunting, cinematic wide-angle editorial photograph. A colossal, gravity-defying architectural structure where the top 10% of the frame is a lush, vibrant floating oasis of green gardens and white marble, bathed in golden sunlight. Below it, stretching into a dark, foggy abyss, is a dense, suffocating forest of rusted iron scaffolding and cramped shanty-structures where the bottom 50% of the population lives in permanent shadow. The scale is 52 to 8. No text, no labels, no charts, no legends. High contrast, atmospheric perspective, National Geographic photography style, somber mood.
insight: The richest 10% of the global population captures 52% of total income, while the poorest 50% earns only 8%.
